name: Dhoolpet Police Station
overview: Set in the volatile area of Dhoolpet, this crime thriller follows a deadly trail of decapitation murders during a vibrant festival, pushing cops into a high-stakes chase where every clue is soaked in danger

trailers.title: Dhoolpet Police Station Trailer | Ashwin Kumar | Guru Lakshman | An aha Original Series | From DEC 5
